expected: The keyboard is up and the user can immediately type.

preconditions: The user is on the main app scene
There is text already typed in the text-entry area.
expected: The text in the text-entry area is cleared.

preconditions: The user is on the main app scene
There is text already typed in the text-entry area.
expected: The text is viewable in fullscreen mode.
The phone is at maximum brightness.
Rotating the phone rotates the text orientation regardless of if phone rotation is on
Long text is scrollable and does not shrink the text.

preconditions: The user is in fullscreen mode, viewing the big text.
expected: The phone is at regular brightness instead of maximum brightness.
The user is back at the main app scene, ready to type.

preconditions: The user is on the main app scene.
expected: The user can set a color mode.
The user can close the overlay with a button or by tapping outside the overlay.

preconditions: The user has changed the settings from their default(s).
tests.action: Completely close and reopen the app.
expected: The user's chosen settings are persisted.
